title: chrysocoma juncea
intro: Chrysocoma juncea, also known as Golden Bush or Chrysocoma, is a small shrubby plant native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma juncea include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Chrysocoma juncea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically in the form of creams or ointments.
